export class ModuleImporter { /** * Creates a new instance. * @param {string} [cwd] The current working directory to resolve from. */ constructor(cwd?: string); /** * The base directory from which paths should be resolved. * @type {string} */ cwd: string; /** * Resolves a module based on its name or location. * @param {string} specifier Either an npm package name or * relative file path. * @returns {string|undefined} The location of the import. * @throws {Error} If specifier cannot be located. */ resolve(specifier: string): string | undefined; /** * Imports a module based on its name or location. * @param {string} specifier Either an npm package name or * relative file path. * @returns {Promise<object>} The module's object. */ import(specifier: string): Promise<object>; }
